metadata.title: Disclaimer | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank Limited values its customers and understands the importance of sustaining the trust and confidentiality required in handling customer information. To show our commitment, we have established a ‘Meezan Bank’s Privacy Policy’, which apprises customers of the information they will be expected to disclose, and how that information will be used by Meezan Bank.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login Disclaimer Policies If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Privacy Policy applicable on the Users of this Website Meezan Bank Limited values its customers and understands the importance of sustaining the trust and confidentiality required in handling customer information. To show our commitment, we have established an ‘Meezan Bank's Privacy Policy’, which apprises customers of the information they will be expected to disclose, and how that information will be used by Meezan Bank. This Privacy Policy governs the manner in which MEEZAN BANK LIMITED collects, uses, maintains and discloses information collected from each user of this Web site. All visitors and customers are advised to understand our privacy policy, and to regularly check for updates. The terms of this disclaimer apply to both websites ( www.meezanbank.pk & www.meezanbank.com ) of Meezan Bank Limited. The disclaimer for Meezan Internet Banking and Mobile Banking APP are located at Meezan Internet Banking Privacy Notice. The Information We Collect Meezan Bank may collect personally identifiable information from Users in several ways, including online forms for ordering products and services, or applying for career opportunities or other instances where Users are invited to volunteer such information. Meezan Bank may also collect information about how Users use the Meezan Bank's Web site, by tracking the number of unique views received by the pages of the Web site or the domains from which Users originate. “Cookies" may be used to track how Users use our Web site, which is a method to store the relevant information of the Users’ PC to identify the User, should they visit the Web site again. While not all of the information that we collect from Users is personally identifiable, it may be associated with personally identifiable information that Users provide us through our Web site. How The Information is Used Meezan Bank may use personally identifiable information collected through our Web site to contact Users regarding products and services offered by the bank and otherwise to enhance Users experience with Meezan Bank. Information collected this way can also be used for research regarding the Web site’s effectiveness and the marketing, advertising and sales efforts of Meezan Bank and partner companies. Disclosure of Information Meezan Bank may disclose information collected from Users to trusted affiliates, independent contractors and business partners (if any) who will use the information for the purposes outlined above. We may also disclose aggregate, anonymous data based on from Users to investors and potential partners. Finally, we may transfer information collected in connection with a sale of our product and services. Maintenance of Information about Users, maintained on our systems, is protected using industry standard security measures. However, we cannot guarantee that the information submitted to, maintained on, or transmitted from our systems will be completely secure. Security Of Information Meezan Bank is committed to building and fostering its customers’ trust. Any information you disclose, therefore, will not be sold to any third party. It may, however, be used to inform you about upcoming product offerings by Meezan Bank from time to time. Loss of Information Meezan bank cannot be held responsible for any information lost during online entries by customers, or other unforeseen external factors, such as power breakdowns or system failures. Third Party Links Where Meezan Bank provides hypertext links to third party web sites; such links are not an endorsement by Meezan Bank of any products or services provided on or via such web sites. The use of such links is entirely at your own risk and Meezan Bank accepts no responsibility or liability for the content, use or availability of such web sites. No Warranties The contents of the site are distributed to you without any warranty of any kind. Meezan Bank Ltd. and the third party content providers disclaim any and all warranties. Information on the site and any local site is provided on an "as is", "as available" basis and to the fullest extent permitted by law we do not give or make any warranty or representation of any kind, whether express or implied in respect of such information whether in respect of the site or any local site. Your use or local site is at your sole risk. We do not warrant the accuracy, adequacy, completeness or timeliness of the information, material, products and services or the error-free the site or local site. We do not represent or warrant that the site will be available or that it will meet your requirements, that access will be uninterrupted, that there will be no delays, failures, errors or omissions or loss of transmitted information, that no viruses or other contaminating or destructive properties will be transmitted or that no damage will occur to your computer system. You have sole responsibility for adequate protection and back up of data and/or equipment and for undertaking reasonable and appropriate precautions to scan for computer viruses or other destructive properties. We make no representations or warranties regarding the accuracy, functionality or performance of any third party software that may be used in connection with any local site. E-mail Meezan Bank does not guarantee that any e-mail from the web site will be sent to you or received by Meezan Bank nor does Meezan Bank warrant the privacy and/or security of e-mails during Internet transmission. Limitation of Liability In no event shall Meezan Bank be liable for any damages, losses or liabilities including without limitation, direct or indirect, special, incidental, consequential damages, losses or liabilities, in connection with your the site or your reliance on or use or inability to use the information, materials, products and services on the site, or in connection with any failure of performance, error, omission, interruption, defect, delay in operation or transmission, computer virus or line or system failure, imperfection, fault, mistake or inaccuracy with this web site, its contents or associated services, or due to any unavailability of the web site or any part thereof or any contents or associated services even if you advise us of the possibility of such damages, losses or expenses. The Service includes facts, views, opinions and recommendations of individuals and organizations deemed of interest. does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of, or otherwise endorse, these views, opinions or recommendations, give investment advice, or advocate the purchase or sale of any security or investment. For Queries And Comments For queries regarding the contents of our statement, please feel free to contact us by e-mail at Info@meezanbank.com or contact our 24/7 Call Center.
